5/4 Morning Watchlist:

News:
- $AMZN launches Supply Chain Services, offering freight, fulfillment, distribution & parcel shipping to any company, and directly challenging $UPS $FDX etc.
- The CLARITY Act advances as $COIN reaches deal on stablecoin yields $MSTR $CRCL $IBIT $ETHA

Earnings:
- Lots of earnings in leading names coming up this week... be careful with new buys
- Watching these for delayed earnings reactions $BE $WDC $VIAV $QCOM $TTMI $FORM

Focus:
- Tight $ARM $GLW $GEV $OPEN and the above earnings
- Memory continuing higher this morning $SNDK $MU $STX $SIMO $DRAM
- Watching the potential setups or moves in emerging software names $TWLO $BB $BAND $TEAM $FIVN etc. & space names $PL $RKLB $ONDS & uranium $OKLO $UUUU $LEU etc. & neoclouds $IREN $WULF $HUT $CIFR etc. & rare earths $MP $USAR $UAMY
